type: feature-spec

research: # optional — path to research report that informed this spec
parent: # optional — path to parent spec (for sub-features)
beads_id: # optional — linked bead issue ID
created: YYYY-MM-DD
---

# {Title}

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected? What is the
current workaround (if any)? Be specific about the pain point. -->

## Scope

### In Scope

<!-- Bullet list of what this spec covers. Be explicit. -->

### Out of Scope

<!-- Bullet list of what this spec does NOT cover, and why. Prevents
scope creep and sets clear boundaries for reviewers. -->

## Key Decisions

<!-- Table of decisions made during research/planning. Each row:
Decision | Chosen option | Rationale | Source (research, user feedback, etc.) -->

| Decision | Chosen | Rationale | Source |
|----------|--------|-----------|--------|
| | | | |

## Functional Requirements

<!-- Numbered requirements. Use MUST/MUST NOT for mandatory, SHOULD for
recommended. Each requirement should be specific and testable.

- FR-001: The system MUST ...
- FR-002: The system MUST NOT ...
-->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- Each criterion in Given/When/Then format. These are the contract
between spec author and implementer. Every criterion will be verified.

- GIVEN {precondition}
  WHEN {action}
  THEN {expected outcome}
-->

## Negative Constraints

<!-- What the implementation MUST NOT do. These are verified during
review and build validation.

- NEVER ...
- DO NOT ...
-->

## Risks

<!-- Table of identified risks with impact and mitigation.

| Risk | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|--------|------------|
-->

| Risk | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|--------|------------|
| | | |

## Open Questions

<!-- Unresolved questions. Prefix with status:
- [RESOLVED]: Question — Answer
- [NEEDS CLARIFICATION]: Question
- [DEFERRED]: Question — Will address in follow-up
-->
